title.rendered: Shanghai Npack Shines at ProPak China 2025

content.rendered:
Shanghai Npack, a leader in advanced packaging solutions, is excited to announce its participation in ProPak China 2025—Asia’s premier processing and packaging exhibition. Join us from June 24–26 at the National Exhibition and Convention Center (Shanghai) to experience cutting-edge technology designed to revolutionize your production line. Find us at Booth 61A05!

Spotlight on Innovation: NP-VF & NP-TC Machines

At ProPak China 2025, Shanghai Npack will showcase two flagship solutions tailored for efficiency and precision:

NP-VF Piston Filling Machine

  • Engineered for accuracy in viscous products (creams, pastes, sauces).
  • Features adjustable filling volumes, CIP/SIP compatibility, and GMP-compliant design.
  • Ideal for food, pharmaceuticals, and cosmetics—perfect for brands prioritizing consistenc

NP-TC Tracking Capping Machine

  • Delivers unmatched speed (up to 200 cappings/min) with zero bottle-slip technology.
  • Supports diverse cap types (screw, snap-on, press-on) and seamless integration with filling lines.
  • Reduces downtime and boosts throughput for beverage, chemical, and pharma industries.

Event Details:

  • Exhibition: ProPak China 2025
  • Dates: June 24–26, 2025
  • Booth: 61A05
  • Venue: NECC, Shanghai

ProPak China 2025 gathers 3,000+ suppliers and 100,000+ industry professionals—don’t miss this chance to network and innovate. Whether you serve food, pharma, or FMCG markets, Shanghai Npack’s solutions at Booth 61A05 will elevate your packaging game.
